data.content: Plan complete. 8 files to change across 3 layers: (1) capture token counts from agent NDJSON output via normalizers in agent-adapter.ts, (2) persist as kind:token_usage entries in existing JSONL interaction logs, (3) parse and aggregate in agent-history-parse.ts, and display in agent-history-session-card.tsx and beat detail views. No new storage systems — piggybacks on existing interaction log infrastructure. Low complexity, additive-only changes.
